Top down-regulated genes (strongest negative Log2FC):

Knocking out BHLHE40 leads to up-regulation of AIF1, EMP3, TMSB4X, SH3BGRL3, GMFG
and down-regulation of CHI3L2, HBZ, APOE, HBA1, GPX4.
The strongest effect is on CHI3L2 
(Log2FC=-1.88 if len(sig) > 0 else 'N/A').
